Design tokens

All values in AGDS-vue use --agds-* CSS custom properties. Override any token in your own CSS after importing the stylesheet: 

:root {
  --agds-color-brand: #your-colour;
  --agds-color-focus: #your-focus-ring;
}

See packages/AGDS-vue/src/styles/tokens.css for the complete list.

Brand colours

Primary palette derived from the AGDS brand colour.

TokenValueSwatch
--agds-color-brand#00698f
--agds-color-brand-hover#005572
--agds-color-brand-active#004260
--agds-color-brand-muted#e0f0f5
--agds-color-brand-muted-fg#003d54

Text

Text colours for body, muted, inverse, and disabled states.

TokenValueSwatch
--agds-color-text#313131
--agds-color-text-muted#6e6e6e
--agds-color-text-inverse#ffffff
--agds-color-text-disabled#9d9d9d

Background

TokenValueSwatch
--agds-color-bg#ffffff
--agds-color-bg-subtle#f5f5f5
--agds-color-bg-muted#e8e8e8

Focus ring

Purple focus ring — meets WCAG 2.2 focus appearance requirements.

TokenValueSwatch
--agds-color-focus#9263de
--agds-color-focus-width3px

Spacing

Spacing scale in rem. Base unit is 4px (0.25rem).

TokenValue
--agds-space-10.25rem / 4px
--agds-space-20.5rem / 8px
--agds-space-30.75rem / 12px
--agds-space-41rem / 16px
--agds-space-51.25rem / 20px
--agds-space-61.5rem / 24px
--agds-space-82rem / 32px
--agds-space-102.5rem / 40px
--agds-space-123rem / 48px
--agds-space-164rem / 64px

Font size

TokenValue
--agds-font-size-xs0.75rem / 12px
--agds-font-size-sm0.875rem / 14px
--agds-font-size-md1rem / 16px
--agds-font-size-lg1.125rem / 18px
--agds-font-size-xl1.25rem / 20px
--agds-font-size-2xl1.5rem / 24px
--agds-font-size-3xl1.875rem / 30px
--agds-font-size-4xl2.25rem / 36px
